evals.prompt: In this Gleam library repo, add the same generated reference docs workflow we used in Gluegun. There is an Astro/Starlight site in website/, a justfile at the root, and I want /reference/ pages generated from package-interface.json before site checks and builds.
evals.expected_output: The project gets a Node generator script, package script, just site-reference recipe, site-check/site-build dependencies, sidebar entries, and validation instructions.
expectations: Discovers the package name from gleam.toml or otherwise adapts it correctly
Adds or updates a reference generator that reads build/dev/docs/<package>/package-interface.json
Wires just recipes so reference generation depends on gleam docs build and website checks/builds depend on reference generation
Updates website navigation so generated reference pages are discoverable
Runs or recommends the smallest relevant validation commands

evals.prompt: Our Gleam project already has a docs site and package.json scripts, but no justfile. Can you add a script that turns Gleam docs JSON into markdown API pages and make npm run build regenerate them first?
evals.expected_output: The project gets a generator and package scripts without inventing a justfile, and build/check scripts are adapted to regenerate reference pages.
expectations: Does not add a justfile when the project does not use just
Adds generate:reference to the existing package scripts using the existing package manager style
Makes the existing build or check path regenerate reference docs first
Handles missing package-interface.json with a helpful gleam docs build error

evals.prompt: Port the Gluegun package-interface.json docs recipe into this monorepo. The Gleam package lives in packages/client and the Starlight website lives in docs/site, so the defaults probably will not work.
evals.expected_output: The workflow is adapted to non-root package and nonstandard website paths instead of blindly copying Gluegun paths.
expectations: Identifies that repoRoot, websiteRoot, docsJsonPath, and outputDir need path adjustments
Avoids hardcoded Gluegun names and paths
Places scripts and generated docs in the existing docs/site structure
Explains any manual sidebar mapping needed for module slugs
